Author: kk-triplesix
Name: QuestieBestie
Description:
Track every blue quest unlock in FFXIV.

- Browse all feature unlock quests with smart filters (expansion, class, location, type, level)
- See what each quest unlocks: dungeons, trials, raids, jobs, and 200+ more
- Full prerequisite trees with MSQ indicators
- Custom tracking lists with in-game overlay and route planner
- Mark quests as completed manually
- Aether Current tracker, Duty Unlock checklist, Side Quest tracker
- Statistics, favorites, personal notes, map flags, chat links
- Customizable overlay with 7 colors, transparency, and font scale
- Multi-language (EN/DE/FR/JP)

Commands:
/questie - Toggle main window
/questie overlay - Toggle overlay
/questie widget - Toggle progress widget
/questie search <name> - Search quest
Punchline: Track every blue quest unlock — see what you're missing, plan your route, never skip a feature.
